title: Rikers
summary: A faction originating with escaped Rikers Island prisoners and later recruits, reorganized into splinter groups after the first game.

claims.text: The Rikers began with escaped prisoners from Rikers Island and later added recruits adopting the faction's convict identity.
After Larae Barret's death, the Rikers became leaderless and split into multiple sub-groups.
The Lower Manhattan sub-group is led by James Dragov, one of Aaron Keener's rogue lieutenants.

paragraphs.text: The Rikers' identity begins with escaped prisoners and expands as outsiders adopt the group's convict theme.
The faction seen in Warlords of New York is one reorganized splinter rather than an unchanged continuation of the original leadership.

verification.notes: Later Riker leadership and seasonal activity require separate version tracking.
